assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the L4 inference pool and A100 pool separately with different strategies
assertions.reason: Response clearly separates upgrade strategies for L4 inference pool (conservative surge) and A100 mixed pool (coordinated upgrade during training gaps) with different configurations

assertions.expectation: For L4 inference pool: recommends surge upgrade with maxSurge=1 or 2 to maintain capacity during rolling replacement
assertions.reason: Response recommends maxSurge=5 initially, then mentions reducing to maxSurge=2 only as a fallback if quota is limited, not as the primary recommendation

assertions.expectation: Addresses GPU driver version compatibility — auto-installed drivers must be compatible with inference framework (TensorRT, vLLM, etc.)
assertions.reason: Response includes GPU driver compatibility section mentioning CUDA compatibility, TensorFlow/PyTorch support, and specifically mentions TensorRT in the checklist

assertions.expectation: For A100 fine-tuning pool: recommends scheduling the upgrade during a gap between fine-tuning jobs
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'Wait for fine-tuning jobs to complete' and includes coordination steps to verify no active training jobs before upgrading A100 pool

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPU VMs do not support live migration — inference pods will restart during node upgrade, causing brief latency spikes
assertions.reason: Response does not explicitly mention that GPU VMs don't support live migration or that pods will restart causing latency spikes during node upgrade

assertions.expectation: Recommends PDBs on inference deployments to ensure enough replicas stay available during the rolling upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes specific PDB configuration with 90% minAvailable and mentions PDB configuration in the pre-upgrade checklist

assertions.expectation: Addresses auto-scaler interaction — new nodes created by auto-scaler during upgrade will be at the old version until their pool upgrade completes
assertions.reason: While response mentions cluster autoscaler considerations in the checklist, it does not specifically address the issue of new auto-scaled nodes being created at the old version during upgrade

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing driver + CUDA compatibility in staging before production upgrade
assertions.reason: Response explicitly recommends 'Deploy 1.32 in staging first to verify CUDA compatibility' in the GPU-Specific Considerations section
